metadata.title: What A Service — Freshworks Consultant | Freshservice & Freshdesk
metadata.description: Implementation, optimization and migration of Freshservice & Freshdesk for mid-market companies. ITIL 4, PRINCE2, Scrum certified. Results in weeks, not months.

hero.headline: Your Freshworks partner for real results
hero.subheadline: Implementation, optimization and migration of Freshservice & Freshdesk for mid-market companies. ITIL 4 · PRINCE2 · Scrum certified. Results in weeks, not months.

cards.title: Low adoption
cards.description: Your team only uses 30% of Freshservice. The investment isn't translating into ROI.

cards.title: Manual processes
cards.description: No automation, breached SLAs, and an overwhelmed support team.

cards.title: Risky migration
cards.description: Your current tool is too expensive but migrating without losing data worries you.

cards.title: HR stuck in Excel
cards.description: Onboarding and offboarding still rely on emails and manual spreadsheets.

services.headline: 5 pillars to transform your IT
services.subheadline: Each service is designed to deliver measurable value, not useless documentation.

cards.title: Implementation
cards.description: End-to-end Freshservice or Freshdesk deployment. Configuration, workflows, self-service portal, training.

cards.title: Optimization
cards.description: Audit of your existing instance. Improve adoption, processes and ROI.

cards.title: Migration
cards.description: Migration from ServiceNow, Jira, BMC or any other tool to Freshworks with zero data loss.

cards.title: ESM (Enterprise Service Management)
cards.description: Extend Freshservice to HR, Finance, Legal. Onboarding, offboarding, internal requests.

cards.title: Training & Coaching
cards.description: Upskill your IT and business teams on Freshworks. Hands-on sessions.

cards.title: Managed Services
cards.description: Ongoing support, maintenance and evolution of your Freshworks instance.

cases.challenge: Freshservice adoption at 30%, frustrated teams, invisible ROI.
cases.solution: Full audit, workflow redesign, targeted training, self-service portal.

cases.challenge: Migration from a legacy tool. Fear of data loss and change resistance.
cases.solution: Progressive migration, parallel training, data validation at each step.

testimonials.quote: Eric transformed how we work with Freshservice. In 4 weeks, our teams adopted it naturally.
testimonials.author: Sophie M.

testimonials.quote: The migration went smoothly. Not a single piece of data lost, and the team was autonomous from day 1.
testimonials.author: Marc D.

about.headline: The expert who makes the difference
about.name: Eric Sib
about.bio: ITSM consultant with over 10 years of experience in IT service digital transformation. Specialized in Freshworks, I combine technical expertise with a pragmatic approach to deliver real results, in weeks rather than months.

footer.description: Freshworks consultant for mid-market and SMBs. Implementation, optimization, migration.
